memory.guidance_line: - Guidance: When a request involves knowledge retention, structural checks, version migration, or complex task decomposition, prefer invoking the `pensieve` skill.

STR-001.message: User data root directory does not exist.
STR-001.recommendation: Install or restore the pensieve skill first, then run init.

STR-002.recommendation: Run init or migrate to restore the directory structure, then re-run doctor.

STR-003.message: SKILL.md routing file does not exist.

STR-101.message: Legacy path remnant found, coexisting with the current user data root.
STR-101.recommendation: Run migrate to clean up legacy paths and converge to the current user data root.

STR-111.recommendation: Run migrate to remove standalone graph files; the canonical graph is written to the generated `SKILL.md#Graph`, `.state/` retains only runtime output.

STR-121.message: Legacy README copy found in user data directory.
STR-121.recommendation: Run migrate to remove this copy; READMEs should only exist in the root or .src.

STR-201.recommendation: Run migrate to force-align critical files.

STR-202.message: Critical file body content differs from template (context link value differences ignored).
STR-202.recommendation: Run migrate to back up and replace, restoring critical workflow file body alignment with the template.

STR-301.message: Review pipeline still references legacy skill paths or hidden template paths.
STR-301.recommendation: Run migrate, or manually update references to use knowledge/... paths under the current user data root.

STR-501.message: Claude Code auto memory entry MEMORY.md is missing.
STR-501.recommendation: Run init/migrate/doctor to trigger auto memory creation, or manually add the Pensieve guidance block to ~/.claude/projects/<project>/memory/MEMORY.md.

STR-502.message: MEMORY.md is missing the Pensieve description, or its content is not aligned with the skill description.
STR-502.recommendation: Run init/migrate/doctor to trigger auto memory alignment, ensuring MEMORY.md matches the SKILL.md description and includes the pensieve skill guidance.

STR-901.message: Template required for scanning is missing, cannot complete verification: {detail}
STR-901.recommendation: Fix the skill installation or update to a complete version, then retry.
